mapper.select: select * from fp_topology_edge where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and id=#{id}
select * from fp_topology_edge where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and topology_id=#{topologyId} order by created_at
select count(1) from fp_topology_edge where tenant_id=#{tenantId}
select count(1) from fp_topology_edge where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and topology_id=#{topologyId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_topology_edge (id, tenant_id, topology_id, edge_key, edge_name, edge_type, source_node_id, target_node_id, relation_type, relation_id, source_object_type, source_object_id, target_object_type, target_object_id, path_json, label_position_json, style_json, metric_display_json, hidden, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{topologyId}, #{edgeKey}, #{edgeName}, #{edgeType}, #{sourceNodeId}, #{targetNodeId}, #{relationType}, #{relationId}, #{sourceObjectType}, #{sourceObjectId}, #{targetObjectType}, #{targetObjectId}, #{pathJson}, #{labelPositionJson}, #{styleJson}, #{metricDisplayJson}, #{hidden}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_topology_edge where tenant_id=#{tenantId} and topology_id=#{topologyId}
